title: The Fang Priest
objective: Defeat the Crimson Fang's priest to break the cult's hold on the eastern roads

dialogue.speaker: PRIEST
dialogue.text: So. The Sword of Ruin stands before me. I had hoped the wraiths would greet you, but you cut through them as the prophecy said you would.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: Prophecy. The Fang's not just a cult — you've been expecting me.

dialogue.speaker: PRIEST
dialogue.text: Every Fang priest learns your name. The wraiths you killed were the ones I bound. The wraith you ARE is the one the prophecy reserves.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The choir scatters when the priest dies. Hold the line — Spirit Edge cuts through their binding.

dialogue.speaker: PRIEST
dialogue.text: The Fang does not end with me. But the eastern roads... yes. You can have those.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The priest is dead. The Fang's eastern network is broken. But the prophecy she spoke — I need answers, and there's only one place left to look.
